title: Learn Before You Evaluate
caption: Technical evaluation begins with guided listening and a clearly bounded musical vocabulary.

title: Reference / Phrase / Compare
caption: A proposed lesson moves from a curated recording to interval recognition, melodic phrase, and guided comparison.

title: Reference / Flattened Output
caption: The ear learns the difference between structure and imitation.

title: Interval Error Card
caption: The card identifies the reference, heard interval, generated comparison, and the limits of equal-tempered notation.

title: Engineer Mode
caption: A future engineering mode would connect listening judgments to model tests without treating one score as cultural authority.

title: Relation to Localization Gap / HAH-WAS
caption: The audit identifies the gap; MaqamAI trains the perception needed to close it.

title: The Trained Ear
caption: The system ends with a listener still learning.
